texto:
SONY Parlante Bluetooth SRS-ULT10 Portátil ULT FIELD 1. Rating promedio: 4.7/5 basado en 157 reseñas. Reseñas: El parlante cumple lo que promete, realmente suena muy bien. El modo ultra hace la diferencia con los bajos. | Initially disappointed until I got a chance to run this thing a while and found the sweet spot between settings and room placement ...  Wow, I love it. Small spaces and low volume do it no justice. It does like to stretch "stretch it's legs" a bit. Definitely more suited for an afternoon/evening of cleaning up garage than a small bedroom office. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] It’s amazing!!! The bass is surprisingly powerful, the sound quality is crisp and it’s super portable. The batter life is excellent and I really love that I can take it anywhere | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I’ve been using the Sony Speaker Ult 1 for awhile now and it is a great portable bluetooth speaker for everyday use. The first thing that stands out is the bass. Pressing the dedicated ULT button gives music a noticeable low-end boost making genres like hip hop sound much more energetic. Don’t let the size of the speaker fool you because it delivers a powerful sound. The speaker feels very durable and the material used is very sleek. I recommend this speaker. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] This is such a nice little speaker to carry around or play music in your bedroom. I love to blast music in my room when I want good sound quality or if I have friends and family over. It’s very easy to use, connected easily, and keeps a charge for awhile, depending on how often you use it. Definitely a great speaker to have! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I’ve been using this speaker for the past couple weeks, and every time i go out fishing or working outside it’s strapped to me or my boat. the bass blows my old jbl out of the water in terms of clarity. i love the portability aswell it’s fairly light and the straps come in handy every time i need to hang her up on the fence or my boat. i really just love how easy and simple of a device it is. i click one button and immediately she’s ready to go and connected. i don’t have to worry about battery as it carry’s the same characteristics from the ULT headphone lineup, you plug it in for 10 minutes and it’s already halfway full. from trap to house jazz to pluggnb, the speaker simply slaps. it’s really incomparable to anything else in its league right now, and i will be getting the bigger versions of it soon. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I didn’t expect to get attacked to a Bluetooth speaker, but Sony ULT Field 1 managed to pull it off. First impressions were very positive. The speaker is compact, lightweight and comes with a carrying strap that honestly looks like it borrowed its design from a pair of sneakers. It’s a fun little detail that makes the speaker feel more casual and portable.
Mine is the Off White version. To be honest, I expected it to be a bit whiter. In daylight, it looks more gray than white, but the iridescent Sony logo adds a nice touch and catches the light beautifully. Overall, the design is clean and minimalistic. Nothing feels unnecessary, and every button is exactly where it should be.
That said, the light-colored fabric comes with a downside. After just one outdoor adventure, nature decided to leave its autograph on the mesh. Dirt and stains are definitely more visible on this color, so if you’re planning to use it mostly outside, a darker version might be the safer choice. 
Now let’s talk about sound. Without the ULT button, the sound is pleasant, balanced, and smooth. It’s perfect for podcasts, background music or a relaxing afternoon. But press the ULT button, and suddenly your ordinary Tuesday starts acting like it was invited to a backyard barbecue. The bass becomes fuller, the music feels more energetic and the whole listening experience gets a lot more fun. What impressed me most is how clean and powerful the sound remains despite speaker’s small size. It genuinely sounds bigger than it looks. Vocals stay clear, instruments are easy to distinguish and the extra bass doesn’t completely take over the mix. Battery life has also been excellent. I’ve consistently gotten around 10-12 hours of use, which is more than enough for a full day at the park, by the pool or just moving from room to room while pretending I’m being productive. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I’ve gone through some portable speakers in my time, and this may be the best. The sound quality is clear at both high and low volumes. We love the rope and use it to hang on the tree, wagon, or lawn chair. The square shape is nice because you can lay it on a surface and it won’t roll like some round designs. This has also taken a few tumbles and weathered all of them. This is a great speaker that will stay around for quite some time.
nombre: Parlante Bluetooth SRS-ULT10 Portátil ULT FIELD 1

texto:
RAZER Audifono gamer barracuda x Bluetooth inalambrico 7.1 negro. Rating promedio: 4.8/5 basado en 18 reseñas. Reseñas: [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The packaging was amazing and beautiful.The instructions are clear and concise.
Overall headphones fit and wear beautifully. 
The Razer Barracuda X has a unique version of connectivity. It does not use Bluetooth. It uses a USB C dongle that instantly connects.
I can switch that between my Galaxy, my PS4, my switch and my PC - just by moving the dongle to the new device. 
(On the PC I also have to change the sound output in settings).
If I want to use it on my iPod I Can use the  3.5mm analog cable in wired mode.
The headphones controls are easy to understand and use- for volume and answering calls.
The surround sound is excellent, allowing me to get more kills in FPS matches 
I use my headphones for music listening as well, and enjoy marathon Spotify sessions with excellent clarity and dynamic sound response.
The Bass is clear and the highs are solid.
The mic is awesome. It only picks me up, which is great. 
My little sister is always busting in my room trying to say hello to my team or crack a joke about me getting sniped - They cant hear it.
They can hear me however- and that makes for better matches and more wins. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I received the Razer Barracuda X Wireless Gaming Headset a few weeks ago and the quality is awesome. My husband is an avid gamer and has tons of gaming accessories, he loves the quality of the Razer headphones. They are lightweight , comfortable and compatible with different video game platforms. The set up is very easy and gamer friendly. He loves Razer products. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I always love Razer products so it’s no surprise how much I like these! Everything you need is in the box! Charger, mic, Bluetooth adapter and usb-c adapter, so no need to worry if they will connect to your device! This completely eliminates the issue of having to go back to the store to make your product work which is super annoying. I’m really happy with the sound quality of these headphones as well. The lay nice and flat like, which I think is a great design feature. Additionally, they are metal inside, (I included a pic) so these are very sturdy, and built to last, so you likely won’t need new headphones for a long time!  These deserve 10 stars! I noticed their was a review left saying that you can’t see which side the mic works on, but you can! It’s labeled on the mic with a little symbol! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] This gaming headset is very well made. My son has had many sets in the past and seems to have issues with longevity of them. 

He's used them several weeks and they are sturdy enough to withstand his tossing around. 

They fit well and feel good and comfortable on his head. The sound quality of both the speakers inside as well as the microphone is excellent. 
Was easy to connect and wifi is clear.

They aren't however wonderful at noise cancellation but I'm not sure they are supposed to be and that doesn't cause issues at all.


He has already told his gamer friends all about them as well as me that he loves them very much... SO that is a WIN!!!

Thanks for a great product that does exactly as it is supposed to! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The sound and response time is very good…they fit great for both a tween and adult.  The sound response is ideal for all games..the set up and connect is super easy especially for a tween who knows how’s to play games.  They are also very comfortable to the ear area. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] When it comes to Razer headphones, I can't say I've ever been a big fanboy. For a variety of comfort, sound, and sometimes even software support difficulties, I've tried and passed on several wired/wireless incarnations of the Kraken, Nari, and Blackshark. The Barracuda X, on the other hand, came out of nowhere to completely exceed my expectations and deliver some outstanding gaming and multimedia performance on both the PC and Switch, all while resolving some of the comfort issues that plagued some of their past outings. All of this was available without the need for Razer's Synapse client, which can be bloated and resource-intensive at times. To be honest, I didn't think the Barracuda X would be a keeper. But it was a surprise and must keep for gamers , Strongly recommend this headset to all gamers. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I got these headphones for my son, to use while he plays the Nintendo switch. I was looking for a wireless connection, without sacrificing quality sound. My son loves the ability to quickly connect the headphones, and I love the quiet room, while he playing! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I got this for my husband and he has been loving it! He actually uses it for conference calls as well! I love that it is so functional and it really is great quality. Perfect for any gift and especially those who game!

1. It's significantly lighter. Even with 0 extra weights, G502 is much heavier.

Disadvantages:

Overall it isn’t a bad mouse, especially if you buy it on sale like I did, but are the improvements that noticeable? texto:
SENNHEISER Momentum 4 Wireless Inálambricos (White). Rating promedio: 5.0/5 basado en 3 reseñas. Reseñas: Los audífonos llegaron absolutamente nuevos, sellados, con todas sus piezas incluidas y funcionando a la perfeccion. No compres basura usada ​​por la misma chusma que te los vende en los mall donde se han rentado un espacio, o piratas, o sin garantía con esa ideología tercermundista que tienes del "costo y beneficio".  Cómpralos en Falabella. 

Esto es asi.

La tecnología alemana  del Momentum 4 funciona hasta cuando se queda sin energia, porque al conectar su cable 3.5mm al celular o laptop vuelven a funcionar, por eso los compré. En cambio, los Bowers & Wilkins y los AirPods no tienen esa capacidad de conversión. Sin duda, los vendería por mucho más dinero hasta que te endeudas y no los puedas pagar.

Su material es de alta calidad. Se conectan rápido y fácilmente al Bluetooth de mi laptop HP y mi celular. Puedes descargar la aplicación  Smart Control + de Sennheiser en Google Play y desde allí amoldar la cancelación activa de ruido, el modo de transparencia, y la configuración de audio e inclusive activar el rastreo  GPS de los audífonos.

Otra compra que me alegra y que tu solo miras y envidias. | El mejor audífono calidad precio

texto: BE QUIET Cpu Cooler Be Quiet! Pure Rock Slim 2 Amd Intel 130w Tdp Led - OFERTA. Rating promedio: 4.8/5 basado en 5 reseñas. Reseñas: Es de buen naterial y no hace ruido | Buena calidad, cpu frio | El be quiet! Pure Rock Slim 2 ha sido una excelente compra para mejorar la refrigeración de mi procesador Ryzen 5 5600X. texto:
RAZER Audifono C/Microf Barracuda X Wireless 7.1 Multi-Platf -Black. Rating promedio: 4.8/5 basado en 18 reseñas. Reseñas: [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The packaging was amazing and beautiful.The instructions are clear and concise.
Overall headphones fit and wear beautifully. 
The Razer Barracuda X has a unique version of connectivity. It does not use Bluetooth. It uses a USB C dongle that instantly connects.
I can switch that between my Galaxy, my PS4, my switch and my PC - just by moving the dongle to the new device. 
(On the PC I also have to change the sound output in settings).
If I want to use it on my iPod I Can use the  3.5mm analog cable in wired mode.
The headphones controls are easy to understand and use- for volume and answering calls.
The surround sound is excellent, allowing me to get more kills in FPS matches 
I use my headphones for music listening as well, and enjoy marathon Spotify sessions with excellent clarity and dynamic sound response.
The Bass is clear and the highs are solid.
The mic is awesome. It only picks me up, which is great. 
My little sister is always busting in my room trying to say hello to my team or crack a joke about me getting sniped - They cant hear it.
They can hear me however- and that makes for better matches and more wins. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I received the Razer Barracuda X Wireless Gaming Headset a few weeks ago and the quality is awesome. My husband is an avid gamer and has tons of gaming accessories, he loves the quality of the Razer headphones. They are lightweight , comfortable and compatible with different video game platforms. The set up is very easy and gamer friendly. He loves Razer products. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I always love Razer products so it’s no surprise how much I like these! Everything you need is in the box! Charger, mic, Bluetooth adapter and usb-c adapter, so no need to worry if they will connect to your device! This completely eliminates the issue of having to go back to the store to make your product work which is super annoying. I’m really happy with the sound quality of these headphones as well. The lay nice and flat like, which I think is a great design feature. Additionally, they are metal inside, (I included a pic) so these are very sturdy, and built to last, so you likely won’t need new headphones for a long time!  These deserve 10 stars! I noticed their was a review left saying that you can’t see which side the mic works on, but you can! It’s labeled on the mic with a little symbol! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] This gaming headset is very well made. My son has had many sets in the past and seems to have issues with longevity of them. 

He's used them several weeks and they are sturdy enough to withstand his tossing around. 

They fit well and feel good and comfortable on his head. The sound quality of both the speakers inside as well as the microphone is excellent. 
Was easy to connect and wifi is clear.

They aren't however wonderful at noise cancellation but I'm not sure they are supposed to be and that doesn't cause issues at all.


He has already told his gamer friends all about them as well as me that he loves them very much... SO that is a WIN!!!

Thanks for a great product that does exactly as it is supposed to! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The sound and response time is very good…they fit great for both a tween and adult.  The sound response is ideal for all games..the set up and connect is super easy especially for a tween who knows how’s to play games.  They are also very comfortable to the ear area. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] When it comes to Razer headphones, I can't say I've ever been a big fanboy. For a variety of comfort, sound, and sometimes even software support difficulties, I've tried and passed on several wired/wireless incarnations of the Kraken, Nari, and Blackshark. The Barracuda X, on the other hand, came out of nowhere to completely exceed my expectations and deliver some outstanding gaming and multimedia performance on both the PC and Switch, all while resolving some of the comfort issues that plagued some of their past outings. All of this was available without the need for Razer's Synapse client, which can be bloated and resource-intensive at times. To be honest, I didn't think the Barracuda X would be a keeper. But it was a surprise and must keep for gamers , Strongly recommend this headset to all gamers. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I got these headphones for my son, to use while he plays the Nintendo switch. I was looking for a wireless connection, without sacrificing quality sound. My son loves the ability to quickly connect the headphones, and I love the quiet room, while he playing! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I got this for my husband and he has been loving it! He actually uses it for conference calls as well! I love that it is so functional and it really is great quality. Perfect for any gift and especially those who game!

The setup was quick and very beginner-friendly, even for someone who doesn’t use printers often. The print quality is excellent—sharp text and vibrant colors, especially for posters and large-format documents. It’s also surprisingly fast and quiet while printing. The compact design makes it easy to fit into a home office without taking too much space. So far, I’ve had no issues with connectivity or maintenance. This printer definitely delivers great value for its price and features! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Omg This Is Big more than I thought! this printer is something else.
The HP DesignJet T250 — this isn’t just a printer, it’s like the Ferrari of large-format printing… only quieter and doesn’t need gas.

Fast, precise, and ridiculously compact — it’s built for people who actually do things. Architects, designers, creatives — the ones who can’t afford slow prints or smudgy lines.
This thing spits out an A1 or D-size print in under 30 seconds… I mean, I’ve had coffees slower than that.

The lines are razor-sharp, the color depth is pure perfection, and with HP Bright Office Inks — everything just pops.
It’s not just printing — it’s producing art that could hang in a gallery.
Even your drafts look too good to mark up.

And size? Tiny. HP literally made one of the world’s smallest plotters.
You can fit it in a studio, an apartment, or even that sad corner of your home office next to your plant that’s barely alive.

The setup? Too easy. Plug it in, connect through the HP Smart App, print from your phone, tablet, or laptop — no cords, no drama, no drivers crying for updates.
It just works — every time. That’s rare.

So yeah, the HP DesignJet T250… it’s fast, flawless, compact, and honestly?
It prints cleaner lines than most people can draw.
If you ever doubted that a printer could be sexy — this one might change your mind. | MUY BUENO Y DE BUENA CALIDAD | I purchased the HP DesignJet T250 24-in printer to replace a 12-year-old T520 printer. This unit is the right choose for my personal use, handling both 24-in CAD prints as well as Tabloid Photo prints with the auto tray feeder. Yes, there are features listed as accessories that people should understand do not come with the base printer, (read what comes in the box). Only negatives I have is the protective film on the touch display is hard to see and remove and that the stated margin for the input tray is the same as manual feed. [0.2 x 0.2 x 0.2 x 0.7 in (manual feed); 0.2 x 0.2 x 0.2 x 0.2 in (input tray)]. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] This plotter is the perfect size for any office. It is fast and easy to set up. Just a few clicks and you’re connected and printing large format color documents. I love that I can print plans quickly and easily from home! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I recently purchased the HP DesignJet T250 24-in Printer (2025 Edition with 2-Year Warranty), and I’ve been thoroughly impressed with its performance and overall user experience. As someone who works from a small home studio, space is always at a premium, so I really appreciated how compact and sleek this printer is—it fits perfectly on my desk without taking over the whole room.

Right out of the box, setup was smooth and straightforward. HP’s Smart App made it easy to connect my devices, and the instructions were simple enough that I didn’t feel overwhelmed at any point. Within minutes, I was ready to print.

What really stood out to me is how fast and accurate this printer is. It can handle multi-page jobs way quicker than my previous model—sometimes even twice as fast. I printed several large-format technical drawings and posters, and the clarity and color accuracy were spot on, especially using HP’s Bright Office Inks. The lines are crisp, and the colors are vibrant without any weird smudging or oversaturation.

One of the biggest wins for me is that it can print a full A1/D-size page in as little as 30 seconds. That’s a game changer when you’re juggling deadlines. Plus, the automatic sheet feeder works flawlessly, so I don’t have to babysit it during longer print jobs.

Another thing I love is its connectivity—I can print directly from my phone, tablet, or laptop without needing to transfer files back and forth. It’s seamless and saves me so much time. This is especially helpful when I’m traveling or working from different rooms in the house.

Overall, the HP DesignJet T250 exceeded my expectations. It’s fast, reliable, and compact—perfect for small studios or home offices like mine. I’d highly recommend it to anyone who needs professional-quality large-format printing without the hassle or bulky equipment. Plus, having the 2-year warranty included gives me peace of mind.

texto:
PHILIPS Audífonos deportivos ActionFit SHQ1400LF00. Rating promedio: 3.8/5 basado en 6 reseñas. Reseñas: Buena calidad, excelente | Hi, I have the Phillips Runwild SHQ1400LF, money well spend, its a brilliant product, love the fact that it lets ambient noise in, to keep you safe.
                    
                    For such an awesome product its very cheap.
                    
                    Thank you Phillips :)
                    
                    Will tell everyone of the product. | They lasted me almost 3-5 years, however it is just a little quiet but very good. I need to go get another one they were amazing. | Estos audífonos han sido una gran sorpresa para mí, especialmente por su precio.
                    
                    Pese al enfoque deportivo con el que el producto se promociona, me sorprendió ver cómo es que el producto viene no con gomas de distintos tamaños si no de distintas formas adecuadas para cada tipo de ocasión, que incluye tanto usos casuales como deportivos. Gracias a ello, estos audífonos no sirven tan solo para entrenar si no también para entornos más casuales. Lo malo de ellas y del producto en general es que no vienen con instructivos que clarifiquen qué pares de gomas sirven para qué tipos de casos, por lo que se requiere mucho sentido común para saber cuáles pares usar para qué niveles de intensidad. También está que, al menos en el caso de los pares pequeños de uso casual, estos son difíciles de encajar sobre el marco de los audífonos, especialmente dado que uno no puede percatarse por anticipado que cada goma tiene impreso el audífono al que debe ir atachado.
                    
                    La calidad auditiva es mayor de lo que pensaba que sería para el precio al que este producto se vende, con lo que los sonidos son bastante claros y detallados. El clip incluido para sujetar los audífonos viene bastante bién de ayuda para cuando los cables se imponen como problema, aunque este también es un dilema mediano al momento de reajustarlo en una posición distinta. Considerando el precio del producto, me sorprende cómo es que pese a ello el cable es realmente duro y persistente, por lo que puedo decir que el producto cumple con el aspecto de ser relativamente duradero. Lamentablemente, no puedo decir necesariamente lo mismo de la tecnología de recepción de sonido ambiente, ya que no parece ser relativamente suficiente para recibir de forma adecuada los sonidos del exterior mientras uno escucha música y/o sonidos a volúmenes moderados, por lo que me veo en la necesidad de bajar el volumen un poco para mejorar mi percepción auditiva del exterior a costa de claridad auditiva con los medios que necesite escuchar.
                    
                    En conclusión, debo decir que pese al incumplimiento relativo de algunos de los aspectos y características promocionadas del producto, yo recomiendo mucho estos audífonos para quienes buscan obtener un producto económico y adecuado para todo tipo de ocasión, y no solamente de carácter deportivo o gimnasta. | Muy buen diseño, el sonido es notable, livianos y cómodos. | Bought these after reading many reviews indicating that they were good. I have found them to be loose on the ear, sometimes falling off and too quiet even on full volume. They let in too much ambient sound. I am very disappointed with the design so will keep on looking for a better set of sport earphones

texto:
LOGITECH G Pro X 2 Lightspeed Audífonos Inalámbricos Alto Rendimiento. Rating promedio: 4.9/5 basado en 11 reseñas. Reseñas: El sonido es increíble aunque los graves están demasiado altos para mi gusto, pero para videojuegos y cine es increíble, oirás cada paso, disparo y sonido con claridad y sabrás donde están. Para escuchar música estaría bien los graves un poco más bajo. Se puede cambiar eso en la APP pero en el IPad no aparece el modelo, asi que no podrás cambiar nada, en PC sí. Suenan muy bien en general. Los estoy usando en un IPad Pro M4 y aunque se activa el bluetooth a mi no me lo reconoce, sin embargo, de forma inalámbrica me conecto por el USB que trae y va perfecto, incluso puedo usarlo mientras conecto el cable para recargarlo. La batería me dura días y días enteros, a veces ni me acuerdo de cuando fue la última vez que los recargué, posiblemente una semana de uso. El Micro esta bien, y se puede quitar o apagar desde un botón.  La calidad es muy buena, los materiales son de metal, incluidos el logo y la diadema que es bastante flexible y son muy cómodos (excepto lo que le da la forma de cascos pues es de plástico), no molestan en largas sesiones, son ligeros y muy cómodos, al menos con los de cuero sintético. Trae otros de tela, pero no los probé. Tienes que mirar bien en la caja pues esta todo bien escondido, pero hasta la caja y su presentación es buena, estan envueltos en una tela. La funda es de tela flexible “parecido” a un traje moderno de buzo. La cancelación de ruido es la del propio material, nada de ruido blanco o algo parecido para cancelarlo. También trae botones de volumen, bluetooth, jack pequeño para micro y otro para cable,  y usb-c. Está cosa es una buena compra, me encantan. | Fidelidad de sonido muy buena, muy buenos materiales y muy comodos, si se consiguen en una buena oferta rentan mucho. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] These headphones are really comfortable to wear, and the ear muffs flip so you can lie them flat on your chest when not in use which makes it easy to have round the neck when not in use.

They're extremely comfortable to wear, pairing to my phone for music was very very easy via bluetooth, for the playstation you need the dongle, sound quality whilst gaming is great. The only gripe (which I suspect is the playstation not the headphones) is that when the headphones are turned off, the playstation does not recognise this, so if you use your playstation to watch Netflix etc you just need to manually change the sound output on your playstation

Overall great but of kit, and I'll certainly get plenty of use out of them for music when commuting and gaming when at home. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The quality of this headset is next level. They are extremely comfy to wear unlike other headsets i’ve used. The mic has a great output quality. They’re also very aesthetically pleasing. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The headset is comfortable to wear for a long period of time due to the memory foam earpads which also help to prolong your game time. I would say that the sound is very clear and precise, you can hear everything without any disturbances from the background noise. Another thing that I like about this headset is that the mic is detachable so you can enjoy listening to music or watching your favourite show right after gaming. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The Logitech Pro X2 is a stellar device that delivers exceptional performance. Its sleek design, comfortable fit, and customizable features make it a top choice for users seeking a high-quality gaming or productivity headset. The crisp audio quality, coupled with the detachable microphone's clarity, enhances communication during gaming sessions or virtual meetings. Logitech's attention to detail, including the durable build and intuitive controls, contributes to an overall outstanding user experience. Whether you're a gamer, content creator, or professional, the Pro X2 proves to be a reliable and versatile companion. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I tried this product with my xbox, the real gaming sound. No noise. It has a noise cancellation built in, crystal clear sound make it real in gaming zone. Loved the quality and the style of the headset, fits perfect. I would recommend it. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Upon opening the box, you are met with impressive presentation of headset and its extras. The sound is excellent, you can even adjust the EQ to meet your needs. The microphone could be a little better compared with others I’ve tried but still an all-round exciting headset for the avid gamer. Build is comfortable which is important when playing for a few hours. Give these a try, you won’t be disappointed.

texto:
LOGITECH Audífonos Inalámbricos Gamer G435 Lightspeed Negro. Rating promedio: 4.6/5 basado en 60 reseñas. Reseñas: I bought this for my partner recently. I had previously bought myself the Zone Vibe 100 which i loved and he needed a new wireless headset.

I wasn't sure what the quality was going to be compared to mine given the price difference but i was pleasantly surprised. The headset is very light and comfortable to wear. The mic quality is good especially considering its and inbuilt mic. The sound is good but you can really hear the difference compared to the zone headset so that's definitely where the price difference falls.

It's a fantastic headset and really good value for money. | Good sound quality, comfortable and well made, light weight enough to wear all day. The fabric ear cups are really good, no sweat or flaking black plastic like you get on the faux leather ones. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The Logitech G - G435 Lightspeed wireless gaming headset is very impressive as it cancels out noise and as its wireless you can move around unrestricted. Its a gaming headset but works great for music and onlinr work meetings too. The Off White and Lilac colour is really lovely too. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] This headset has been an absolute hit with my son. He is an avid gamer and has his personal requests from a headset. This ticks them all. Firstly looks 'bomb' which I've been told means great. It's a good weight not heavy but not light. It extends well and doesn't feel flimsy when fully widened. The build quality and materials are great and well done, no cheap quick assembly. Its charge is prompt and efficient, easily lasted a days gaming requirements. The range is impressive. Clear sound all the way around the house. Easy set up. Sound quality is clean and clear, he said whether its gaming or music it delivers well for everything you want to pump through it. His main compliment was how comfortable it was, no headache pinching or pressure,..ears did not get sore around the lobes which was a huge thumbs up from him. Highly recommend. Great piece of kit. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] So easy to connect up and the sounding coming from them is completely out of this world. No cable to get tangled up on and simply easy to move around and use highly recommended, the price is worth what you pay | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] A great product with good battery longevity. Good volume adjustment , easy to charge , easy to wear and adjust accordingly. Stylish looking with yellow spring attachment. Reseñas: [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The Pro X Superlight 2 is hands-down the best mouse I’ve ever used. It’s incredibly lightweight, and you can instantly feel the difference in how smooth and quick your aim becomes. Perfect for fast-paced games — it reacts instantly with no lag, and the clicks feel crisp and satisfying.

The shape is super comfortable, and even during long gaming sessions, it never feels heavy or awkward. Battery life is also amazing — I barely ever need to charge it. The clean white design looks awesome on my setup too.

If you want a mouse that helps you play better and feels amazing to use, this is 100% the one. Highly recommend it! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] i bought this a while back and have had no problems definitively if not one of the best the best gaming mouse i would recommend to any1 | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Great reliable mouse, have been using it for a year or 2, had to take it apart to fix the battery, apart from that all good. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] overall is good but the mouse wheel can get stuck and not work. ive played with it a bit and decided to work again but i did struggle for couple months though | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Over the last 10 or so years I have used and collected an absolute onslaught of popular and not so popular gaming mice. From Razer to Zowie to Steelseries, you name it, I've used it. This is THE BEST gaming mouse I have ever owned and the one which has lasted the longest by far.
The design is sleek and comfortable. It shares a multitude of similarities to the renowned Zowie fk1, but without the drawbacks of a wired connection and the buttons on both sides of the fk1 getting in the way for right handed users. It's symmetrical design instead of an ergonomically "curved" right handed only design is very friendly for claw grip users and overcomes a lot of the grip based issues right handed only mice have. You won't have any flared base or finger grooves forcing you out of your preferred grip style.

I've used it extensively for 3 years so far and haven't even needed to replace it's pads as with every other mouse I've owned. The build quality is just utterly exceptional.

If you want the best performance for esports and aim centric gameplay, this is the endgame. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I bought this mouse in December of 2024 and so far it’s been really good. Feels good in my hand, glides nicely on my mousepad and has an overall stable feeling. Scroll wheel and side buttons work great as well as M1 and M2. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I bought it few weeks ago and it’s been amazing to use, its wireless and long lasting battery has been such a convenience. The lightness of the mouse makes it an amazing device for playing games | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I bought this for competitive gaming and got exactly what is needed, high polling speed, lightweight and veratile across devices. Logitech ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

texto:
AMAZON Echo Show 8 3ra Generación Blanco. Rating promedio: 4.7/5 basado en 30 reseñas. Reseñas: Compré el producto , muy facil de instalar ,llegó en perfectas condiciones . | Exactamente lo solicitado | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] This is the best smart device I have owned. The ability to use it like a tablet and control numerous devices is awesome. The video quality and ability to watch my pets while not home is a huge bonus. The sound quality is great. I can hear it across my house while cleaning. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] A great piece of technology that does everything it’s supposed to do. I keep it in the kitchen to read my recipes, listen to music or audiobooks, or watch videos. 

The speaker makes up most of the back body. While it is loud enough to enjoy over a set of sizzling pots and pans, it isn’t a rich sound. Which is fine for my purposes. 

When I leave for town, I move the device to the living room in order to monitor my cats. The camera is wide enough to capture the whole room and the picture is clear enough to see it all. Also appreciative that there’s a physical means to close off the camera so my personal FBI agent can’t spy on me. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I was so excited to get this because I always wanted one. I was able to easily set it up. I was able to access pictures to play continuously of my family and even program it to my voice. Adding smart lights soon to that Alexa can help me set the mood. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Before getting this I only had an echo dot so I was excited to get this product. I love being able to see what song is playing instead of having to ask. I like that the time and weather are always on the screen instead of again having to ask. It has been nice to have my pictures linked to it so I can see memories whenever I am near it. I also like that I can click on my notifications and that there is just so much more I can do with this than what I was able to do with the echo dot. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I was given the Echo Show 8 Generation 3 device in exchange for my honest review.  I’ve had an Echo dot since they came out and currently have 4 through out my home.  We also have several Alex enabled tvs or fire sticks. You can say I’m a fan of the technology!  I would love to have everything in my home voice controlled and I’m getting there with the help of Alexa.  There are too many things to list what an Echo Alexa enabled device can do for you. To start as simple as telling you the time, weather, driving distances, store hours, game updates, to controlling by voice your AC, sprinklers, lights, cameras, and vacuum. It’s very handy.  This is my first Echo with a display and it’s so much more fun.  It is has an 8 inch screen and is a black charcoal color (comes in white too). We are keeping it on our Kitchen island so it can be used in the family room or kitchen as needed.  They sell an optional stand that tilts and I will be getting that for more versatility. The quality of sound while playing music is very good and now I get to see the name of the song and artist as well as song lyrics scroll for most songs.  I can ask for a recipe and see it on the screen and then touch screen to scroll back and look at it. I ask for the weather and it shows a visual including the days ahead and then it displays local news items from the city I asked about.  It’s a very “smart” device. I now have a camera.  I can drop in for a live view from my phone while away from the house and see my pet!!  For security there is a camera cover that you can keep in place if you choose.  It can also recognize family members once you set this up and customize the screen when they are near by.  This plays a slideshow of your photos and can take selfies. I would like to have given this a 4.5 stars out of 5 due to the set up, touchscreen limitations, and lack of manual. I’m fairly tech savvy and not having any written directions or guide on how to use and what you can do with this device is a huge miss. My screen got stuck during set up and I could not find a way online to fix it and since the device kept repeating what you last touched I was ready to throw it.  I called for help finally had to repeat my issue a couple of times and then after a factory rest we were back on setting up.  Plan to have patience on the set up. I’m also not loving a 4 yes 4 finger swipe. I’m trying to get used to tapping everything twice not once as it repeats button button until you get it right. I have some things to learn for sure and a manual would be so very helpful.  We were not friends to begin with and now we are developing a good relationship. I’m still in love with it and can’t live without! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I love using my echo for playing podcasts or music while I’m cooking in the kitchen. The audio quality is surprisingly good (good bass too) and I can use Spotify with it. I like that you can upload photos so it acts just like a digital frame when you’re not using it. Also nice to see the weather on it and learn things like word of the day
nombre: Echo Show 8 3ra Generación Blanco

texto:
SONY Parlante Bluetooth SRS-ULT10 Portátil ULT FIELD 1 Negro. Rating promedio: 4.7/5 basado en 161 reseñas. Reseñas: Sonido impecable, no se distorsiona al subir volume, muy buena calidad del material y resistente | El parlante cumple lo que promete, realmente suena muy bien. El modo ultra hace la diferencia con los bajos. | Initially disappointed until I got a chance to run this thing a while and found the sweet spot between settings and room placement ...  Wow, I love it. Small spaces and low volume do it no justice. It does like to stretch "stretch it's legs" a bit. Definitely more suited for an afternoon/evening of cleaning up garage than a small bedroom office. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] It’s amazing!!! The bass is surprisingly powerful, the sound quality is crisp and it’s super portable. The batter life is excellent and I really love that I can take it anywhere | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I’ve been using the Sony Speaker Ult 1 for awhile now and it is a great portable bluetooth speaker for everyday use. The first thing that stands out is the bass. Pressing the dedicated ULT button gives music a noticeable low-end boost making genres like hip hop sound much more energetic. Don’t let the size of the speaker fool you because it delivers a powerful sound. The speaker feels very durable and the material used is very sleek. I recommend this speaker. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] This is such a nice little speaker to carry around or play music in your bedroom. I love to blast music in my room when I want good sound quality or if I have friends and family over. It’s very easy to use, connected easily, and keeps a charge for awhile, depending on how often you use it. Definitely a great speaker to have! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I’ve been using this speaker for the past couple weeks, and every time i go out fishing or working outside it’s strapped to me or my boat. the bass blows my old jbl out of the water in terms of clarity. i love the portability aswell it’s fairly light and the straps come in handy every time i need to hang her up on the fence or my boat. i really just love how easy and simple of a device it is. i click one button and immediately she’s ready to go and connected. i don’t have to worry about battery as it carry’s the same characteristics from the ULT headphone lineup, you plug it in for 10 minutes and it’s already halfway full. from trap to house jazz to pluggnb, the speaker simply slaps. it’s really incomparable to anything else in its league right now, and i will be getting the bigger versions of it soon. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I didn’t expect to get attacked to a Bluetooth speaker, but Sony ULT Field 1 managed to pull it off. First impressions were very positive. The speaker is compact, lightweight and comes with a carrying strap that honestly looks like it borrowed its design from a pair of sneakers. It’s a fun little detail that makes the speaker feel more casual and portable.
Mine is the Off White version. To be honest, I expected it to be a bit whiter. In daylight, it looks more gray than white, but the iridescent Sony logo adds a nice touch and catches the light beautifully. Overall, the design is clean and minimalistic. Nothing feels unnecessary, and every button is exactly where it should be.
That said, the light-colored fabric comes with a downside. After just one outdoor adventure, nature decided to leave its autograph on the mesh. Dirt and stains are definitely more visible on this color, so if you’re planning to use it mostly outside, a darker version might be the safer choice. 
Now let’s talk about sound. Without the ULT button, the sound is pleasant, balanced, and smooth. It’s perfect for podcasts, background music or a relaxing afternoon. But press the ULT button, and suddenly your ordinary Tuesday starts acting like it was invited to a backyard barbecue. The bass becomes fuller, the music feels more energetic and the whole listening experience gets a lot more fun. What impressed me most is how clean and powerful the sound remains despite speaker’s small size. It genuinely sounds bigger than it looks. Vocals stay clear, instruments are easy to distinguish and the extra bass doesn’t completely take over the mix. Battery life has also been excellent. I’ve consistently gotten around 10-12 hours of use, which is more than enough for a full day at the park, by the pool or just moving from room to room while pretending I’m being productive.
nombre: Parlante Bluetooth SRS-ULT10 Portátil ULT FIELD 1 Negro

texto:
SEISA Mandos para Play 4 Combo x2 Joystick Inalambrico Control Ps4 Dualshock. Rating promedio: 3.6/5 basado en 11 reseñas. Reseñas: Me gusto mucho, rapidez y suavidad del producto | Muy buena al comienzo no me encantó pero en el momento que la empeze a usar lo ame | Buena calidad por el precio | One of the best things about the PS4 is the controller. Seriously, this is the most comfortable controller I have ever used. It is much bigger than the ds3 and fits in your hand well without becoming greasy and slippery, not to mention the vastly improved triggers and joysticks. After using this controller and going back to play the PlayStation 3, the old controllers feel like toys. The battery life is oddly short so i would recommend having two to swap during long gaming sessions. | I managed to pre-order and get the PS4 and I have to say the best part about it is the controllers. They're much larger than the PS3 controllers, which makes them fit in your hands instead of your fingers. They feel amazing and are very comfortable in the hands. The joysticks feel great and your thumbs do not slip off of them. The L2 and R2 triggers now curve outwards, making them easier to press. I saw a review about the battery life being short but my Dualshock 4's battery life is about 8 hours. He's probably just having so much fun that he didn't realize how long he was playing. | Pense que serian blancis o como miestra la foto… mas transparencia con el oroducto que entregran… despues de todo bien | Having had a PS3 for over 4 years... I definitely know the pains of having to use the Dual Shock 3 controller...

Its buttons were a little flimsy, and sticks were too close for comfort, and the d-pad a little too stiff.

Thankfully, that's all changed with the new Dual Shock 4!

The first thing you notice is the controller definitely has more heft to it.

Then you notice the lightbar on the back... which so far doesn't really do anything except look pretty, and becomes color coded to your in-game-health... for some games. Will be interesting to see what game devs make of this.

Finally, you notice the touch pad and the buttons. Like the lightbar, touchpad seems a little funky at the moment - it doesn't seem to work on the PS4's homescreen, and only a few games so far are making use of it (though Kill Zone's implementation was downright excellent).

However, the buttons and sticks on this controller are MUCH IMPROVED! Sticks are now farther apart, and easier to keep your thumbs on. D-Pad is downright perfect... feels much less mushy but still solid and premium.

Complaints:

Share and Options button are too flush to the controller.... its a little too hard to press them, especially if gaming in the dark.

Battery life could be better a lot better. This is something Dual Shock 3 did right, it lasted over 12 hours on a charge, whereas this controller is averaging 7-8 hours.

Finally, I don't know why Sony included a speaker in this controller. Its frankly a bit bad. You can tell its just one speaker, its quite a bit tinny, and they seriously could have left it out without making much of a difference.

Conclusion:

This is definitely the best controller Sony has ever made for the PlayStation consoles. But its not the best controller, period. Yet. | From everything I have read and heard, Witch is stuff most people do not know.
This system is going to change the world of gaming as we know it to a world beyond imagination.
nombre: Mandos para Play 4 Combo x2 Joystick Inalambrico Control Ps4 Dualshock

Reseñas: I bought this product a week ago and it is excellent. | Had these replaced under warranty for my CX True Wireless Plus and the service from Sennheiser was second to none. the sound quality is awesome, deep bass, deep filled mid and tingling treble, the noise cancelling is a step up from the last pair and I feel isolated in listening to my fave tunes. Just listened to 'kiss and say goodbye' by 'the Manhattans and sounded glorious as if I was there in the studio, I am very impressed. I initially struggled with finding the sweet spot for the touch pads on each earpiece but soon got the hang of it as was the same for the CX pair previously. Well done Sennheiser. | These are basically the Momentum TW4 with not as fancy a case. More specifically, the issue with TW4 is that the audio weirdly cuts out if you touch the buds in certain spots (same as if you're standing too close to a microwave in use), whether you're adjusting them or tapping through controls. That doesn't happen here at all. The fit is very comfortable, the earbuds stand up to sweat during a run and sound just as good as the flagships. | Amazing sound close to a MOMENTUM. I 100% would recommend this product, the fit is nice, and the look is unique. But all esthetics aside this product is really full of amazing features. you get Sennheiser sound + great ANC + cool features like LE audio and access to the app. all of it for a super accessible price range. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] These are great, been using them over my AirPods a lot more as they have a great battery life and with them coming with an array of different size and shaped earbuds i can change it to what suits me better like at the gym I’ll use the larger ones so they don’t fall out and the smaller ones at home cause they’re a bit more comfortable. | Unbelievable sound , extremely comfortable fit. texto:
ASTRO GAMING Audífono Con Micrófono Astro A50 Gen 5 BT Inalámbrico Base BLANCO. Rating promedio: 4.2/5 basado en 13 reseñas. Reseñas: Such an incredible headset, and at a great price. Most comfortable headset (with customization with third-party ear pads), excellent sound quality, unbeatable mic quality, and great battery. Connectivity is perfect between my PS5 and Mac or iPhone. 

The only thing I wish was different is the dock — not only is it fairly big, but getting the headset to charge on it can be difficult. | This headset is great. Super comfortable for long gaming sessions, the charging bay is always easy to dock and works consistently, and the audio is super clear with easy adjustments. The only critique I have is that the mic is very "rubbery". This is normally good, except when I want to move it closer to my face, it will just go back to it's default position away from me after about 5 minutes. This means that getting clear audio out is sometimes an issue. However, it's only been brought up to me like twice in the time I have had it. | I've been wanting this headset for the longest and i finally purchased it, in a perfect time , for Logitech really have them super crispy tuned! | I love this headset. I had an Astro A30 headset before and just wanted to upgrade and this was definitely an upgrade. The material feels super premium and is extremely comfortable. I’ve had several 4+ hour gaming sessions and had no fatigue from the headset and no headaches. 10/10 would recommend! | I'm so happy a friend of mine talked me into buying these. I plan on purchasing more products in the future. | The Astro A50 isn’t just a headset—it’s a weapon. The moment it touches your ears, the world outside disappears, replaced by a soundscape that feels alive and merciless. Explosions roar like thunder, footsteps stalk you from the shadows, and voices slice through the chaos with haunting clarity.

The wireless freedom feels untethered, almost dangerous, as if nothing can break the connection between you and the battlefield. And when it rests on its glowing dock, it looks less like an accessory and more like a relic awaiting its next war.

Yes, it’s costly, and yes, the battery could endure longer—but the experience it delivers makes those flaws feel insignificant. The Astro A50 doesn’t just deliver sound—it consumes you, leaving silence feeling hollow and weak in its wake. | Like the sound quality. Better then my g933. Don't have a problem with low sound | Espectacular! El sonido, diseño, sistema, comodidad y utilidad. Súper recomendado
nombre: Audífono Con Micrófono Astro A50 Gen 5 BT Inalámbrico Base BLANCO

texto:
GENERICO Capturador Video Hdmi Usb 3.0 4k Windows Mac Linux Micrófono. Rating promedio: 3.7/5 basado en 19 reseñas. Reseñas: I bought this device several years ago and encountered bad software issues in the past.
But the latest software release is excellent, and a breeze to install (I uninstalled
all old stuff first). As always, high quality recordings, but what's still missing is 'Pause recording", OBS can pause. Apart from that, best software ever. | I have purchased three of these over the last couple years, and I use them all. I connect these to be able to even capture BIOS screens for instruction manuals. I have them connected to computers through DVI and I also use one connected Display Port. I also have other brands, I have purchased to use for what I need it for. But the best thing about the USB3HDCAP in the past has been it's bundled Stream Catcher software.
I was sorely disappointed when the Stream Catcher software stopped working because of Adobe discontinuing support for their product. I cannot point to hard a finger at Startech for that. However it was known for some time the software was being moth balled. Would have been nice to have a replacement software that works as easy and well, before that happened.  As recommended I tried OBS, I do not find it friendly or easy to use like the purpose built Streamcatcher.  I found my own solution for at least two of the devices, I have a laptop I disabled all the network connectivity on and turned back the date 1 year.  This laptop pretty much does nothing but capture screen shots and screen video. So I can live with not allowing it to connect to a network to get updates.  I am looking forward to a good purpose built software again. I have also recommended this device to others.  Looking forward to this product being GREAT again. | I bought this a few months ago and i'm glad I did it | I've had this unit for a few months now and I am very happy with the unit overall. 
The device captures various screen sizes and is perfect for capturing VGA and DVI sources 
from older computers that do not support the installation of a modern screen recording software. 
Perfect for creating video tutorials using older computer hardware. 

There was one issue many users have encountered  when using the StreamCatcher software, 
and that being unable to move the GUI window from one monitor to another when using multiple monitors on a PC. 
This is actually possible to do, however it requires you to double click on the capture window to cycle through (x3) 
different GUI window sizes; Full Screen, Normal and Small. You can only move the StreamCatcher GUI window across to other 
Monitors when the GUI is in the SMALL window size. So you simply have to double click on the GUI capture window when you see your video feed, 
double click a couple of times...and you can toggle to the proper screen size and then move it across to your other shared PC monitors. :)

Hope this information helps future users out there.
A Great product! :)D

Cheers!
-Gerry | I was need to capture video from old VHS cassetes 20-25 years old and happy that found this device. It is privide maximum possible quality with S-Video in interface for S-VHS and VHS. StreamCatcher SW is quite simple and stable. Sometimes it is detect CopyRight protection via S-Video cable (is it possible?) and stop recording, but it was one time only.  This solution works great! One point for SW update: it is not possible to move StreamCapture SW window from one monitor to another when using multiple monitors with PC. Why? :) | This is a very good product. I have been using it for about 18 months. I did have to educate myself about how to use DirectShow with VLC. But the hardware is very good quality. Now I just need Startech to make one capable of 4K video capture. I will buy it when they do. | I bought this from Amazon and it has been amazing!  I had a minor issue when I first installed it but tech support helped me through it.  What was amazing was I called them on a holiday and not only did they help me through it, the gentleman who helped me was really cool and professional...even though I was bugging him on a holiday!  I haven't had a problem with it since!  My only complaint is that it's not Mac compatible, but I knew that going in so I don't hold it against them...just maybe a suggestion for the near future considering the most common forms of video editing are done on Mac. | The product is good. I just had a lil problem and I can say the tech support from Startech is amazing. Thank you to DAN and DAVID, the software kept displaybg "NO SIGNAL" until we changed the USB port I was using on my PC, it's good now! Thank you guys
nombre: Capturador Video Hdmi Usb 3.0 4k Windows Mac Linux Micrófono

texto:
REDRAGON Combo S146-SP Teclado Mecánico K668RGB + Mouse M724 Black. Rating promedio: 4.2/5 basado en 28 reseñas. Reseñas: I bought a set of these sheets from my local mattress store with my new mattress, and they were everything I expected them to be - crisp, cool, not scratchy, and easy to put on! I've slept on them two nights so far and really enjoy them. Since the sheets are so crisp and cool getting into bed feels refreshing now that it's getting warm outside. They aren't scratchy and feel smooth, definitely smoother than my previous Laura Ashley percale sheets. It's too early to tell about durability. I did go around the edge of the fitted sheet before I washed them to check for any bad hems/elastic, and I didn't find any. The sheets feel sturdy and high quality.

I noticed some reviews complaining about the sound and texture of them, but I think they didn't understand that those things are typical with any set of percale sheets. Percale is a type of weave, and it results in a crisp and cool sheet. Due to that, they definitely have more of a rustle and crinkle sound when moved compared to other sheets. So if that bothers you, I would opt for a different kind of sheet. They aren't as cozy or snuggly feeling as other types of sheets, but that's part of what makes them feel cooler. Personally, I use flannel sheets in the cold months and percale in the warm months. | Best sheets! Better than Matouk or Italian sheets! | I absolutely love DreamFit percale and cannot believe how stunning the quality of these products are! I have had these sheets for more than a year and they are still incredible quality! | I LOVE the crisp feel of the Percale sheets during the summer time. They are so cool and comfortable. They feel like hotel linens from a 5-star hotel. | These sheets are wonderful.  Easy to put on the bed and they stay put on the mattress.  I love them! | Obsessed!! These sheets feel like your favorite comfy T-shirt! The stretch gives the sheets the ability to move with your body. These sheets will also keep you cool and dry at night. My boyfriend is a sweater when he’s asleep, and, I’m a tosser, so these sheets are a staple in our sleep system! | Great fit. They stay in place and fit extra think mattresses. Soft! Really like the stretch and colors. | These sheets are incredibly soft, durable and stretchy. We really hoped to find a set that wouldn’t pop off when we used our new adjustable mattress. Normal sheets were driving my fiance nuts so I gave these a try because of the guarantee that they will not pop off. Well, they did not disappoint. These have not popped off once! We love ours!

texto:
LOGITECH Audifono Gamer Con Microfono G522 Lightspeed Blanco. Rating promedio: 4.8/5 basado en 58 reseñas. Reseñas: (Esta reseña se ha recibido a través de una promoción.) Un diseño muy cómodo, el sonido es perfecto y el micrófono muy fácil de usar. Su rendimiento dura un montón y su ergonomía súper cómodo todo, le encanta y lo uso muchísimo | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Amazing headset!, very very comfy on your ears and your head so a great aize/fit, sound quality is really really good and clear especially while playing computer games, seems very strong so if you drop them they won't brake easily, battery life is also very very good and lasts for hours on end, overall a must product for any gamer who is looking for an affordable and great quality headset! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I have been living in this headset!
The sound quality is amazing, and perfect for gaming. 
The battery life is unreal, one charge goes for days! 
And I love the fact that the mic is removable, making them brilliant for both music on the go, and transforming into the perfect work buddy when I need to record audio.

Fabulous product. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Nice comfy fit sound is amazing in game or just scrolling YouTube. Great battery life you can get some good gaming sessions before they need charging. I love that the mic is removable. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I’ve been using these headphones for work for the last month and I’ve been really impressed. They look really good (I’ve had quite a few people comment on how nice they are with the colourful lighting) and they’re lightweight and comfortable to wear for long periods.
They aren’t noise-cancelling but do a surprisingly good job of blocking out most background noise. The sound quality is great, and connecting via Bluetooth is quick and easy.
My only small criticism is that there’s no quick way to check the battery life without opening the Logitech app, which would be handy to have built in.
Overall, they’re stylish, comfortable and perform really well, a great option for daily use. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The Logitech G522 LIGHTSPEED is honestly one of the best headsets I’ve ever owned. They’re incredibly comfortable — super lightweight, with soft ear cushions that don’t cause any pressure even after hours of gaming or listening. I can wear them all day, not just when I’m playing — I use them while cleaning, working, or even relaxing at home, and I barely notice I have them on.

The design is absolutely stunning — clean, modern, and with customizable RGB lighting that looks amazing on my setup. It feels premium but still has that cozy, gamer vibe.

The microphone quality is top-notch. My friends always tell me how clear and crisp I sound during games or calls. The BLUE VO!CE technology really makes a difference — no background noise, no muffled sound, just perfect clarity.

Sound-wise, these headphones deliver incredible audio quality. The PRO-G drivers make every detail in the game pop — footsteps, background effects, music — everything sounds rich and immersive.

Another big plus is how easy it is to customize everything through Logitech G HUB. You can tweak the lighting, sound profiles, and even adjust the mic exactly how you like it.

The battery life is also fantastic — it lasts for long gaming sessions without needing frequent charging, which is a huge advantage for wireless headsets.

Even my fiancé, who’s a passionate gamer and very picky about his gear, tested them — and he was really impressed! He said the sound quality and comfort easily rival some of the top gaming headsets he’s used. | (Esta reseña se ha recibido a través de una promoción.) Estos auriculares con micrófono son de otro nivel.
La calidad del sonido IMPRESIONANTEMENTE espectacular, he probado varios auriculares antes y no tienen nada que ver, el sonido parece real, todas las dimensiones posibles,  reducción de ruido en el micrófono que se puede quitar y poner, alta comodidad, puedes estar horas con los auriculares puestos que no sientes molestia ninguna. Además tienen 3 tipos de conexión, el que más me gusta es el del USB que lo pones en el dispositivo y listo, es que se conecta automáticamente, muy muy cómodo!! También tiene bluetooth. La batería dura días sin tambalearse ni perder calidad de sonido y además las luces se pueden personalizar desde la app.  Si te gusta estar durante horas jugando, teletrabajas y haces uso de auriculares, o simplemente te gusta escuchar música, está es la mejor opción, cómoda y de alta calidad. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] These headphones have been a great addition to our household. 

I use them for: attending online makeup masterclasses, listening to music on walks and of course gaming. My partner also gets great use out of them too for gaming and for listening to music. 

They are very comfortable to wear for long periods of time and the sound quality is good. One minor thing is that I don’t think the microphone is the best in terms of the sound quality and it’s also not very flexible. But again it’s a very minor thing and we both enjoy using them 😊
nombre: Audifono Gamer Con Microfono G522 Lightspeed Blanco

texto:
JBL Sense Lite Auriculares Open-Ear con Sonido. Rating promedio: 4.2/5 basado en 66 reseñas. Reseñas: Bought these a month ago and use them out in public. I love that they don’t hurt my ears like normal ear buds since they don’t go in the ear. They just rest there. They’re really comfortable and I can wear them all day with no issue. The sound quality is great. I can listen to conversations easily while having music play and I can always turn the volume up to drown out outside noise too. Though be careful since others can hear if it’s too loud. The charge battery lasts a long time on the case and yes, the buds charge in the case. Overall, really love my new JBL sense lite a lot. | Necesitaría un video explicativo sobre las utilidades del mismo. | Most headphones are uncomfortable but I can forget I’m wearing these. Very happy. | era lo esperado, sencillo, buena comodidad al portar el producto, sonido muy bueno | muy buen sonido, prácticos, seguros. lo único que no leí al momento de comprar, es que no trae cable para cargar. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Loving these JBL sense lite headphones! They truly are “lite” to wear and quite comfortable.  Great for times when you want to listen to tunes while still hearing what’s going on around you and most importantly keep safe.
I can go on a run and feel at ease as I can hear on coming traffic or other patrons.  They stay on very well. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Well if you have never have worn over the ear Bluetooth headphones your in for a nice surprise.  The design is simple yet effective. Light weight and the sound is amazing. Much better than expected.  Fit takes some getting used to but when you find the right angle to put it in on.  It fits great and won’t hurt your ears.  Sometimes with in the ear headphones you get an itch but you avoid that all together with these on.  They work great for taking phone calls as well.  They hold a charge pretty long and last longer than u had expected them to off the charger. What makes over the ear headphones nice is that you are  still able to hear things going on around you but still sounds loud enough to where it won’t district you either. | Excelente producto justo lo que buscaba, permite escuchar música sin dejar de escuchar alrededor, conecta fácil, buen alcance, la batería dura bastante
Muy feliz con la compra
nombre: Sense Lite Auriculares Open-Ear con Sonido

texto:
MARSHALL Audífonos Bluetooth Major V On-Ear Wireless 100Hrs Café. Rating promedio: 4.5/5 basado en 58 reseñas. Reseñas: Muy buen sonido, cómodos y estilo vintage | I got this headphones in July of 2025 and it’s march 2026 and the headphones stopped working,never got them wet always kept them charged with the battery protector on and now they won’t charge and the red light is always on | The best on the ear headphones I’ve ever had. Super comfortable and stylish. | I own a lot of pairs of headphones, due to the work I do, etc. Currently I think 7 pairs.

I've owned two pairs of Major II's, a pair of Major IV's, still own Monitor III's, and now the Major V's.

They have the best battery life out of any other headphones ever. I use my headphones for 2-2. 5 hours every single day hiking, and I only need to charge them around every 5-6 months.


My Marshall Major IV's lasted approximately 2 years. They still work great, but they're destroyed from wear, sweat, etc. They are still 100% functional, but just like every other pair, they take a beating, and are worn out physically.

They have the great bassy Marshall headphone sound, which I love & prefer compared to Sony / Bose. The first MAjor II's blew my mind on that.

The great thing on the Major V is they have a custom equalizer on the app, which the Major IV's did not, which I loved on the Monitor III's, giving me 2 equalizer settings I can switch between for music and audio books. They're switchable with a button on the headphones, which is great. 

If you're considering buying these headphones, know they're a little bassier than other headphones, but not muddy. The equalizer gives you a lot of control over the sound, which means you can get whatever you want out of them. 

Best battery life, no noise cancelling (which I prefer while hiking), great sound, and last forever. 

Worth every penny and then some. 

Make sure to buy an extra set of ear pads when you purchase. They last a couple years, but eventually will break. This is not a problem for me, as the rest of the headphones are usually worn out too, from hiking, and wear and tear. This has been greatly improved since the Major II.

I always forget to buy them, and just end up buying a new set of headphones anyway, because I love the upgrade.

Worth the extra few bucks, to extend the life of the headphones a little longer. | These don't have ANC, but they are close to it. I love these headphones, that's why I own a black and brown pair. They're very comfortable, flexible and stylish and last a long time. texto:
ELGATO Tarjeta de Captura 4k S Externa 4K60 HDR10 VRR. Rating promedio: 5.0/5 basado en 35 reseñas. Reseñas: I purchased recently to upgrade my capture capability from Black Magic HD UltraStudio. I am glad I did- the image quality is better and the capture is seamless without any special driver downloads (Mac OS). I am using OBScast. | Esta es la mejor capturadora portátil que he utilizado, me encanta lo pequeña y ligera que es se me hace perfecta para cuando necesito llevármela de viaje | Después de probar la 4K S durante varias semanas en distintos escenarios, puedo decir con total seguridad que es una de las mejores capturadoras externas que he utilizado hasta ahora. La compré con la intención de mejorar la calidad de mis transmisiones y grabaciones en consola, pero terminó superando mis expectativas en prácticamente todos los aspectos.

Lo primero que destaca es la calidad de imagen. Captura en 4K60 con una claridad impresionante y una reproducción de color muy fiel. No hay compresión agresiva ni artefactos visibles, incluso en juegos con mucho movimiento o escenas oscuras. Para quienes hacemos contenido, sabemos que la fidelidad visual es clave, y esta capturadora mantiene intacta la experiencia original del juego.

Otro punto fuerte es la latencia prácticamente inexistente. El passthrough funciona de manera impecable: puedes jugar directamente desde tu monitor o televisor sin notar retraso alguno, lo cual es fundamental para títulos competitivos donde cada milisegundo importa. En sesiones largas nunca sentí que estuviera “jugando a través de una capturadora”, simplemente funciona.

La instalación también es muy sencilla. Es literalmente conectar y usar. No tuve problemas de compatibilidad ni configuraciones complicadas. En minutos ya estaba grabando y transmitiendo. Además, el diseño es minimalista, elegante y compacto. No ocupa espacio innecesario en el setup y se integra muy bien visualmente.

En cuanto a estabilidad, ha sido totalmente confiable. No he experimentado desconexiones, sobrecalentamiento ni fallos inesperados. Esto es algo que valoro muchísimo, porque cuando estás en medio de una transmisión en vivo lo último que quieres es que el equipo falle.

También me parece importante mencionar que es ideal tanto para creadores que están comenzando como para quienes ya trabajan a nivel más profesional. Tiene la calidad necesaria para producciones exigentes, pero al mismo tiempo es lo suficientemente sencilla como para no intimidar a alguien que apenas está empezando en el mundo del streaming o la creación de contenido.

Si tuviera que resumir mi experiencia, diría que la 4K S ofrece rendimiento profesional con facilidad de uso real. Es una inversión que se nota desde el primer día y que realmente eleva la calidad del contenido.

Definitivamente la recomendaría a cualquier creador que quiera capturar gameplay en 4K con estabilidad, precisión y sin complicaciones técnicas. | La capturadora definitiva. Super sencilla de usar y con una excelente calidad de imagen final. Ya puedo hacer directos con la Nintendo Switch 2 con 2 clicks. Además de poder capturar mucho tiempo de gameplay y no los 30 seg por clip que te deja capturar la Switch. Una maravilla, super recomendada! | Es increíble como se ven mis grabaciones ahora en comparación a mi anterior capturadora... Siempre crees que no va a haber una mejora tan grande cuando upgradeas tu equipo pero... nada que ver, y encima fácil de usar. | Durante nuestro evento, utilizamos la Elgato Game Capture 4K S y se mostró como una de las mejores opciones para capturar tanto juegos retro como títulos actuales. Nos permitió trabajar con diferentes consolas y resoluciones sin complicaciones, manteniendo una señal estable y de alta calidad en todo momento.

Su versatilidad fue clave para adaptarse a distintos setups dentro del evento, desde hardware clásico hasta plataformas modernas. Para quienes buscan una capturadora confiable y flexible para múltiples generaciones de consolas, la Game Capture 4K S es una opción muy sólida. | La uso tanto para grabar como para streamear y va de lujo. Se conecta fácil y capta todo en alta calidad sin líos. Me ha salvado mil veces en directos y no se me traba nunca. Perfecta si quieres grabar tus partidas o contenido con un resultado que se ve genial. | Captura fluida y fiable para consolas y PC. Perfecta para grabar, crear contenido y/o streamear en alta calidad con una configuración sencilla.
nombre: Tarjeta de Captura 4k S Externa 4K60 HDR10 VRR
