texto:
LOGITECH - Mouse MX Master 4 Wireless Recargable 8K - Negro. Rating promedio: 5.0/5 basado en 31 reseñas. Reseñas: Tiene buen tamaño para manos grandes. Es muy cómodo, tiene buena conexión, es rápido, las ruedas son muy buenas y la calidad se nota excelente. Se puede instalar un software para configurarlo mejor :). Lo recomiendo! | El museo muy cómodo y se siente de gran calidad
Funciona impecable
Es el único formato de mouse que me quito el dolor de muñeca y que no es muy diferente a uno normal | (Esta reseña se ha recibido a través de una promoción.) Soy fiel usuaria de Logitech, de hecho tenía en uso actualmente el modela anterior y debo decir que es una pasada este nuevo modelo MX 4 que han sacado. 

La conectividad es instantánea a cualquier dispositivo por bluetooth, pero si no fuese posible trae el adaptador USB C.

Tiene una precisión de ensueño. Yo lo uso fundamentalmente para tareas de edición, diseño y programación pero la verdad que creo que sería ideal en videojuegos. 

La ergonomía de estos modelos es una de las características principales, evitando dolores en la mano y en el túnel carpiano a las personas que trabajan con el mouse durante horas.

La verdad que es un diseño muy innovador, con una gran precisión, fiabilidad y fácil conectividad a cualquier entorno. No es becario utilizar mousepad a diferencia de sus predecesores. | (Esta reseña se ha recibido a través de una promoción.) El Logitech MX Master 4 es simplemente increíble. ¡Apenas tendrás que recargarlo solo tres o cuatro veces al año! Lo he estado usando a diario durante varios meses y la batería apenas ha bajado un 2 %. Realmente impresionante.

En pocas palabras, este es el mejor ratón del mundo ahora mismo. Su ergonomía es insuperable; incluso después de usarlo más de 8 horas al día, nunca siento incomodidad ni fatiga. Una de las primeras cosas que me sorprendió fue lo silenciosos que son los clics. Puedes trabajar en completo silencio sin ese molesto sonido constante.

El nuevo panel háptico es otra incorporación fantástica. Ofrece una respuesta táctil muy satisfactoria, y al pulsar el botón lateral se abre una pequeña rueda de acceso rápido con atajos para el día a día súper útil.

Con el software Logi Options+, puedes personalizar cada botón y gesto para distintas aplicaciones como Photoshop, Chrome o cualquier otra que utilices.

La rueda de desplazamiento MagSpeed es de otro nivel: ultra suave, rápida y puede girar casi sin fin. Es perfecta para navegar por documentos largos o líneas de tiempo con precisión.

Si trabajas con varios dispositivos, este ratón es el GOAT. Se conecta hasta a tres dispositivos simultáneamente y puedes cambiar entre ellos al instante con un solo clic. Por primera vez, el dongle LogiBolt incluido también es compatible con USB-C, lo cual es una mejora muy bienvenida.

Veredicto final

En conclusión, el Logitech MX Master 4 es, sin duda, el ratón más avanzado y cómodo disponible hoy en día. Ya sea para trabajar, jugar o editar vídeos, ofrece un rendimiento impecable.
Altamente recomendado: 10/10.

The Logitech MX Master 4 is nothing short of incredible. You’ll barely ever need to recharge it just three or four times per year! I’ve been using it daily for several months, and the battery has only dropped by 2%. Truly amazing.

Simply put, this is the best mouse in the world right now. Its ergonomics are unmatched even after using it for over 8 hours a day, I never feel any discomfort or strain. One of the first things that impressed me was how quiet the clicks are. You can work in complete silence without that constant clicking noise.

The new haptic sense panel is another fantastic addition. It provides a satisfying tactile response, and pressing the side button opens a small quick-access wheel with everyday shortcuts — super handy.

With Logi Options+ software, you can customize every button and gesture for different applications like Photoshop, Chrome, or anything else you use.

The MagSpeed scroll wheel is out of this world — ultra-smooth, fast, and can spin almost endlessly. It’s perfect for navigating long documents or timelines with precision.

If you work across multiple devices, this mouse is the GOAT. It connects to up to three devices simultaneously, and you can switch between them instantly with a single click. For the first time, the included LogiBolt dongle also supports USB-C, which is a welcome upgrade.

Final Verdict

In conclusion, the Logitech MX Master 4 is hands down the most advanced and comfortable mouse available today. Whether you’re working, gaming, or editing videos, it performs flawlessly.

texto:
LOGITECH - Mouse MX Master 4 Wireless Recargable 8K - Negro. Rating promedio: 5.0/5 basado en 31 reseñas. Reseñas: Tiene buen tamaño para manos grandes. Es muy cómodo, tiene buena conexión, es rápido, las ruedas son muy buenas y la calidad se nota excelente. Se puede instalar un software para configurarlo mejor :). Lo recomiendo! | El museo muy cómodo y se siente de gran calidad
Funciona impecable
Es el único formato de mouse que me quito el dolor de muñeca y que no es muy diferente a uno normal | (Esta reseña se ha recibido a través de una promoción.) Soy fiel usuaria de Logitech, de hecho tenía en uso actualmente el modela anterior y debo decir que es una pasada este nuevo modelo MX 4 que han sacado. 

La conectividad es instantánea a cualquier dispositivo por bluetooth, pero si no fuese posible trae el adaptador USB C.

Tiene una precisión de ensueño. Yo lo uso fundamentalmente para tareas de edición, diseño y programación pero la verdad que creo que sería ideal en videojuegos. 

La ergonomía de estos modelos es una de las características principales, evitando dolores en la mano y en el túnel carpiano a las personas que trabajan con el mouse durante horas.

La verdad que es un diseño muy innovador, con una gran precisión, fiabilidad y fácil conectividad a cualquier entorno. No es becario utilizar mousepad a diferencia de sus predecesores. | (Esta reseña se ha recibido a través de una promoción.) El Logitech MX Master 4 es simplemente increíble. ¡Apenas tendrás que recargarlo solo tres o cuatro veces al año! Lo he estado usando a diario durante varios meses y la batería apenas ha bajado un 2 %. Realmente impresionante.

En pocas palabras, este es el mejor ratón del mundo ahora mismo. Su ergonomía es insuperable; incluso después de usarlo más de 8 horas al día, nunca siento incomodidad ni fatiga. Una de las primeras cosas que me sorprendió fue lo silenciosos que son los clics. Puedes trabajar en completo silencio sin ese molesto sonido constante.

El nuevo panel háptico es otra incorporación fantástica. Ofrece una respuesta táctil muy satisfactoria, y al pulsar el botón lateral se abre una pequeña rueda de acceso rápido con atajos para el día a día súper útil.

Con el software Logi Options+, puedes personalizar cada botón y gesto para distintas aplicaciones como Photoshop, Chrome o cualquier otra que utilices.

La rueda de desplazamiento MagSpeed es de otro nivel: ultra suave, rápida y puede girar casi sin fin. Es perfecta para navegar por documentos largos o líneas de tiempo con precisión.

Si trabajas con varios dispositivos, este ratón es el GOAT. Se conecta hasta a tres dispositivos simultáneamente y puedes cambiar entre ellos al instante con un solo clic. Por primera vez, el dongle LogiBolt incluido también es compatible con USB-C, lo cual es una mejora muy bienvenida.

Veredicto final

En conclusión, el Logitech MX Master 4 es, sin duda, el ratón más avanzado y cómodo disponible hoy en día. Ya sea para trabajar, jugar o editar vídeos, ofrece un rendimiento impecable.
Altamente recomendado: 10/10.

The Logitech MX Master 4 is nothing short of incredible. You’ll barely ever need to recharge it just three or four times per year! I’ve been using it daily for several months, and the battery has only dropped by 2%. Truly amazing.

Simply put, this is the best mouse in the world right now. Its ergonomics are unmatched even after using it for over 8 hours a day, I never feel any discomfort or strain. One of the first things that impressed me was how quiet the clicks are. You can work in complete silence without that constant clicking noise.

The new haptic sense panel is another fantastic addition. It provides a satisfying tactile response, and pressing the side button opens a small quick-access wheel with everyday shortcuts — super handy.

With Logi Options+ software, you can customize every button and gesture for different applications like Photoshop, Chrome, or anything else you use.

The MagSpeed scroll wheel is out of this world — ultra-smooth, fast, and can spin almost endlessly. It’s perfect for navigating long documents or timelines with precision.

If you work across multiple devices, this mouse is the GOAT. It connects to up to three devices simultaneously, and you can switch between them instantly with a single click. For the first time, the included LogiBolt dongle also supports USB-C, which is a welcome upgrade.

Final Verdict

In conclusion, the Logitech MX Master 4 is hands down the most advanced and comfortable mouse available today. Whether you’re working, gaming, or editing videos, it performs flawlessly.

texto:
AMAZON Parlante alexa echo dot kids dragon cuenta con control parental 5ta generacion. Rating promedio: 4.9/5 basado en 28 reseñas. Reseñas: Tamaño colo el de la foto, buena calidad de material, funcionamiento adecuado | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] We were tired of our kids always taking over the dot in our living room to play music so when we saw this kids version, we knew it was just what we needed. It works every bit as well as the adult version but comes in an adorable design perfect for kids. We love it! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] We bought our granddaughters an echo dot for kids a couple years ago and she loves it so we decided to get a newer one for their room here at our house. You get 1 year of amazon kids included which I appreciate. It has a very easy to use parent dashboard (even easy to use for grandparents) I can set daily time limits and filter what they use and see, you can also set up to 4 kid profiles up so that it is truly tailored for each one and heir age. There really are endless possibilities with this. Our older granddaughter (she is 8) likes to set an alarm to wake up to. She also uses it when she needs a little help with her homework. Our younger granddaughter is learning to use it (she is 3) she likes to ask Alexa to read her a bedtime story. She also loves telling Alexa she wants to have a dance party lol. The girls also love the fact they can ask Alexa to call their mom or dad whenever they want when they are here. They also use the one at home to call me and gpa when they are there. Just over all I think its a wonderful device to have, I wish we would have had it when my 3 were growing up! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] We have two alexas at home one in the kitchen and one in the basement. The kids love it as they can ask alexa questions, have it play music, have it control our lights and many other things. They were so excited to see the little blue owl when they opened the box and wanted to immediately set it up in their bedroom. My wife and I love the parental controls and how safe we can make it. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] This is adorable and so much fun!! It was very easy and fast to set up and our kids absolutely love it.  They have so many options of things they can do. They love asking Alexa to play a game, tell them a joke, have a dance party, or to tell them stories. Some favorites: “The Floor is Lava” and “Freeze Dance”. Alexa will endlessly answer their questions in a kid-friendly and age appropriate way. We use the timers all the time and it is very convenient. Music sounds great on this little speaker and the kids (ages 6 and 8) are able to use it on their own immediately.  This has been a huge hit at our house and has given our kids some independence while still under parental controls and filters. You can set daily time limits and the parent dashboard is very user friendly. We are getting a second one for upstairs for them! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] My children absolutely love their new Echo Dot Kids (5th Generation), they were so excited and curious the moment I unboxed it for them.  We absolutely love the design of the owl, it’s cute and standout in our breakfast/play area.

We love having the Echo Dot because it allows our kids to have a sense of independence (ages 3 and 5), they love being able to command Alexa with all kinds of requests such as, playing music, checking the weather, setting timers, asking questions, playing games, making silly sounds, and etc.

We no longer need to set timers as our little helpers love to help set them for us!  It’s a great way to allow our kids explore and expand their knowledge.  This has also been great for our kids specifically as it helps encourage them to practice their English (bi-lingual family and English is not their primary language).

Another plus, it seems that the hardware is the same as all the other Echo Dots, so you’re not really getting less.  You’re actually getting more as the Echo Dot Kids includes a year of premium content from Amazon Kids+.  What’s not to love?!

Setup was quick and simple, just plug and play and follow the steps once you download the app.  I personally like that the app allows you to customize settings on the parent dashboard; you can customize time limits, certain content, adjust age filter, and etc.

Overall, it’s been a positive experience with our Echo and the kids are loving it so we couldn’t be any happier with it!  If you are looking to add a digital assistance device in your home and you have kids, you certainly can’t go wrong with an Echo Dot Kids, it’s simple and easy to use and fun and helpful all at the same time. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] My kids love this so much! Not only is it an adorable owl it is my kids favorite. They ask the Alexa to play music, ask questions, tell jokes and even at bedtime tell them a story. They love it so much. If you're on the fence about whether or not to get one for your kids, do it. We love ours. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I love this Echo Dot for my daughter. She loves to listen to her kids music while playing in her room. She is able to ask Alexa for what she wants, and being able to set up parental controls for safety is a must. She really likes the little gams she can play, as well. I think this is a great tool for a little one to take some (limited) control of her very own Alexa.

texto:
BEATS STUDIO PRO Wireless Auriculares Inalámbricos - Sand Gray. Rating promedio: 4.7/5 basado en 9 reseñas. Reseñas: [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Honestly love these headphones, they came in handy for listening to my music when I just want to listen or taking phone calls when working out and such. I truly enjoy the sound on these great quality and the noise cancellation is A1. I’m super satisfied with this product ! Charges very fast as well so no issues at all. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I’m so excited about these! I have small ears which make inner-ear headphones really uncomfortable. These over-ear headphones are comfortable, easy to use and pair, and feel like good quality. Looking forward to using them regularly for work and travel. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Punchy beats with smooth, detailed sounds - these headphones are very versatile and fantastic for everyday use. Active Noise Cancellation is super useful when you are sitting in a noisier area. 

Pros: Comfortable to wear for hours on end, great battery life, sound is clear but still enough bass to give it a little more punch, mic is clear for the person on the other end when taking calls, no lag. When you use the cable to connect the headphones to your phone, the sound quality improves significantly,     giving a deeper, richer sound. Also having find my on this is great too! 

Cons: connectivity could use some improvement - it is not as seamless as my airpods when connecting to my phone and switching from one device to another. It’s a little more manual but not a deal breaker.

texto:
LG MONITOR 27U730A-B 274K UHDIPS60HZHDMIX2DPHEADPHONES-OUT 3-POLOS SOLO SONIDO. Rating promedio: 4.4/5 basado en 25 reseñas. Reseñas: (This review was collected as part of a promotion.) As someone who juggling daily multitasking operations, I recently tested this 4K Ultrafine monitor, and it has enhanced my professional workflow.
The absolute standout features of this 31.5-inch screen is that it allowed me to comfortably snap multiple full-size windows side-by-side. Moreover, it offer versatile connectivity as it is equipped with a 90W USB-C port and integrated well into my multi-screen setup. 
However, the monitor is not without flaws. While the picture quality is amazing, its structural integrity is not great. Specifically, the screen wobbles when I turn it to share content with colleagues during in-person meetings.
Despite this wobble, it remains a gorgeous workhorse that elevated my productivity and integrated well into a professional, multi-screen professional environment. | (This review was collected as part of a promotion.) I love this TV and highly recommend it the size is perfect to move anywhere you would like an its not as heavy as it may seem and very easy to move when moving your room around | I use this for coding and professional computer work.  i have it side by side with the lg ultrafine 5k and while there is a quality difference between 4 and 5k, the price more than makes up for it.
An excellent dual monitor purchase. | This is an awesome screen. For the price, it couldn't be beat, and jumping up to a 5k 120 refresh rate would have quadrupled the cost. For me, hooking it up to my Mac and doing contracts and occasional video editing is more than enough. The wide screen is a game changer for opening contracts and splitting the screen, plus the ergonomic factor of not having to look down at my laptop screen, even though my Mac screen obviously has a better image. This is still a good setup for my needs. Plus, this model allows me to charge my laptop while mirroring, using the same cable. I have been using it for 1 month. | Excellent display, no glare, great graphics, good size and quality build. Thank you LG for making great electronic machines. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The picture quality of this monitor is amazing. It’s so clear and the clarity is great when playing my games. Perfect addition to my game set up. I also love the ease of the additional usb c so it’s so very easy to connect my laptop to the monitor. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The latest 2025 VA-LCD display from LG comes with a few limitations, mainly the refresh rate and colour gamut, which are only just adequate for creative work. That said, the colour accuracy and overall picture quality are genuinely impressive.

The stand could be stronger for a monitor of this size, as it wobbles slightly, but it’s not a dealbreaker. The built-in speakers are decent — not a replacement for a sound system, but definitely better than what I’ve had on previous monitors.

LG’s on-screen menu is excellent, and the small joystick makes navigation very comfortable. The colour modes are well designed too. For a 2.2 gamma, Mode 3 seems the closest match. I calibrated the display, but even out of the box the accuracy was very good. Just make sure to turn HDR off if you want the most consistent results. Viewing angles are perfectly fine for a main display.

Brightness is more than acceptable — in native brightness mode, contrast performance is excellent.

USB-C (latest version) delivers both power and video, and the built-in hub lets you connect other devices directly to the monitor, making a one-cable setup possible.

The design is minimalistic but stylish, with a low-key aesthetic that fits well in most setups. | (This review was collected as part of a promotion.) RAZER Audifono C/Microf Barracuda X Wireless 7.1 Multi-Platf -Black. Rating promedio: 4.8/5 basado en 18 reseñas. Reseñas: [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The packaging was amazing and beautiful.The instructions are clear and concise.
Overall headphones fit and wear beautifully. 
The Razer Barracuda X has a unique version of connectivity. It does not use Bluetooth. It uses a USB C dongle that instantly connects.
I can switch that between my Galaxy, my PS4, my switch and my PC - just by moving the dongle to the new device. 
(On the PC I also have to change the sound output in settings).
If I want to use it on my iPod I Can use the  3.5mm analog cable in wired mode.
The headphones controls are easy to understand and use- for volume and answering calls.
The surround sound is excellent, allowing me to get more kills in FPS matches 
I use my headphones for music listening as well, and enjoy marathon Spotify sessions with excellent clarity and dynamic sound response.
The Bass is clear and the highs are solid.
The mic is awesome. It only picks me up, which is great. 
My little sister is always busting in my room trying to say hello to my team or crack a joke about me getting sniped - They cant hear it.
They can hear me however- and that makes for better matches and more wins. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I received the Razer Barracuda X Wireless Gaming Headset a few weeks ago and the quality is awesome. My husband is an avid gamer and has tons of gaming accessories, he loves the quality of the Razer headphones. They are lightweight , comfortable and compatible with different video game platforms. The set up is very easy and gamer friendly. He loves Razer products. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I always love Razer products so it’s no surprise how much I like these! Everything you need is in the box! Charger, mic, Bluetooth adapter and usb-c adapter, so no need to worry if they will connect to your device! This completely eliminates the issue of having to go back to the store to make your product work which is super annoying. I’m really happy with the sound quality of these headphones as well. The lay nice and flat like, which I think is a great design feature. Additionally, they are metal inside, (I included a pic) so these are very sturdy, and built to last, so you likely won’t need new headphones for a long time!  These deserve 10 stars! I noticed their was a review left saying that you can’t see which side the mic works on, but you can! It’s labeled on the mic with a little symbol! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] This gaming headset is very well made. My son has had many sets in the past and seems to have issues with longevity of them. 

He's used them several weeks and they are sturdy enough to withstand his tossing around. 

They fit well and feel good and comfortable on his head. The sound quality of both the speakers inside as well as the microphone is excellent. 
Was easy to connect and wifi is clear.

They aren't however wonderful at noise cancellation but I'm not sure they are supposed to be and that doesn't cause issues at all.


He has already told his gamer friends all about them as well as me that he loves them very much... SO that is a WIN!!!

Thanks for a great product that does exactly as it is supposed to! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The sound and response time is very good…they fit great for both a tween and adult.  The sound response is ideal for all games..the set up and connect is super easy especially for a tween who knows how’s to play games.  They are also very comfortable to the ear area. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] When it comes to Razer headphones, I can't say I've ever been a big fanboy. For a variety of comfort, sound, and sometimes even software support difficulties, I've tried and passed on several wired/wireless incarnations of the Kraken, Nari, and Blackshark. The Barracuda X, on the other hand, came out of nowhere to completely exceed my expectations and deliver some outstanding gaming and multimedia performance on both the PC and Switch, all while resolving some of the comfort issues that plagued some of their past outings. All of this was available without the need for Razer's Synapse client, which can be bloated and resource-intensive at times. To be honest, I didn't think the Barracuda X would be a keeper. But it was a surprise and must keep for gamers , Strongly recommend this headset to all gamers. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I got these headphones for my son, to use while he plays the Nintendo switch. I was looking for a wireless connection, without sacrificing quality sound. My son loves the ability to quickly connect the headphones, and I love the quiet room, while he playing! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I got this for my husband and he has been loving it! He actually uses it for conference calls as well! I love that it is so functional and it really is great quality. Perfect for any gift and especially those who game!

texto:
SONY Audífonos WF-LC900 LinkBuds Clip Lavanda. Rating promedio: 4.6/5 basado en 62 reseñas. Reseñas: [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Not only is the sound impeccably clear, these earbuds are quite literally the most perfect design for anyone with small or shallow ears or for those with a sensitive head. Traditional buds always fall out of my ears, these are a clip style that holds them perfectly in place so you never miss a beat! 10 out of 10! | Me encantaron los audífonos, se cayeron al agua y quedaron cubiertos de agua por 1 hora y siguieron funcionando | Me gustan mjcho estos audifonos porque se escuchan genial, su aplicacion y funciones son muy rapidas y accesibles y su duracion es de las mejores, inclusive se me cayeron al agua y siguieron funcionando | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Sony Electronics LinkBuds Truly Wireless Open Earbuds are very versatile product. These are compact and lightweight. I like the color and sleek case of these earbuds. They are very comfortable for long wear due to their design . The noise cancellation feature works very well. It is very effective in most cases except loud crowds. The sound quality is very good. The bass of music feels like if you listen on large speakers. The design of earbuds are very unique and holds ear very well. I really appreciate this design where I don’t have to put earbuds directly into my ear. It’s very nice to have these earbuds for phone calls and music during workouts. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I really like the design of the case added on the lavender color it’s super nice. I also enjoying the ear buds I like that they don’t got directly into my ear. They don’t fall out of my ear like other ear buds. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I received this product for free from Influenster and Sony in exchange for my honest review. I’ve been using the Sony LinkBuds Clip for a little while now and they surprised me in a really good way. The open-ear design took a day or two to get used to, but once I did, I actually prefer it for everyday use. I like being able to hear my music or podcasts while still being aware of my surroundings, especially when walking outside, working, or doing things around the house.

The fit is probably my favorite part. They’re really lightweight and don’t give that plugged-up feeling some earbuds do after an hour or two. I wore them during a longer workday and honestly forgot that I still had them on. The clip style feels nice a secure without feeling too tight, and they stayed in place better than I expected. 

Sound quality is solid overall. Since they’re open-eared earbuds, you won’t get super deep noise-isolating bass like traditional earbuds, but the audio sound is clean and well balanced. Voices and podcasts came through especially clear for me. Calls were also surprisingly good. I tested them outside in a busier environment and people said my voice still sounded clear. 

Battery life has been great so far too. I haven’t had to think about charging much, and the quick charge feature is pretty useful when you forget to plug them in overnight. Pairing was quick with my phone and switching devices was a breeze. The case and earbuds themselves feel really minimum but premium. I also like that the packaging was minimal and didn’t feel wasteful. 

These are defiantly geared more towards comfort, awareness, and connivence over super immersive noise cancellation, but for everyday wear they’ve been super enjoyable to use. | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I’m really enjoying my Sony Link-buds Clip so far! The lavender color is absolutely beautiful and they are super lightweight and comfortable to wear. They stay securely in place without slipping, which is a big plus. The features are great and the noise canceling works very nicely. I’m still discovering everything they can do but overall I’m very impressed! | [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Sony's wireless open ear-buds deliver a practical, comfortable listening option for everyday use where awareness matters. They're best suited for casual listening, outdoor activities, and office environments rather than bass-heavy music enthusiast or studio-grade audio work. If you value openness safety, and comfort, they're worth considering-especially if you pair them with Sony's ecosystem or your preferred devices.
nombre: Audífonos WF-LC900 LinkBuds Clip Lavanda

texto:
LOGITECH Mouse Inalámbrico M720 Triathlon Negro. Rating promedio: 3.9/5 basado en 165 reseñas. Reseñas: Happily using with Mac Mini, Ubuntu and Windows 11. Now if I could only find and affordable monitor switch! | Hen I had to purchase a new mouse for my iMac, I knew from past experience that it would be  Logitech. The Triathlon has been great: reasonable price, easy to use, reliable. If I live long enough to need another one, here is where I will start. | Outstanding performance and ergonomic. Comfortable to operate for long hours at the computer and very responsive to my hand movements. | This is the 2nd one I've had, the only reason I was replacing the previous mouse was because the rubber sides were starting to disintegrate | No problems yet. I like that you can switch between 3 laptops. | works great, especially for this price point. thumb button is a nice addition to your standard mouse | I like the weight of this mouse. It's very responsive. The wheel is a little sensitive but other than that, it's great. I highly recommend buying one. | I’ve been using the M720 Triathlon for a while now, and overall it’s a fantastic productivity mouse at a very fair price point. The ergonomics are comfortable with a nice thumb rest, and it feels natural for long work sessions. One of the standout features is the ability to pair with up to three devices and switch between them with a single button—it’s seamless and makes multitasking across my laptop, desktop, and tablet so much easier.

The scroll wheel is excellent with both precise notched scrolling and a smooth free-spin mode, which is great for quickly moving through long documents. Battery life is outstanding—it runs on a single AA and can last close to two years. Setup with Logitech’s software is simple, and there are plenty of customization options for the extra buttons.

That said, it isn’t perfect. It’s not a gaming mouse—the polling rate and DPI range just aren’t designed for that. Some users also report that the rubber coating can wear down over time and that the switches may eventually develop double-click issues after heavy use. Personally, I haven’t run into those problems yet, but it’s something to keep in mind for the long term.
nombre: Mouse Inalámbrico M720 Triathlon Negro
